message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Czech Election Study 2006 (CSES Module 2)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11026","justification":"National post-election survey focused on political behaviour, attitudes, party choice, and evaluation of government and democracy in the Czech Republic after the 2006 parliamentary elections (2000s timeframe)."},{"title":"Czech Election Study 2002 (CSES Module 1)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11025","justification":"Post-election survey in the Czech Republic covering voter behaviour, political attitudes, party preferences, and perceptions of political institutions following the 2002 elections, clearly within the 2000s."},{"title":"Czech Republic – European Social Survey 2002 (ESS Round 1)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Includes Czech respondents in 2002; contains rich measures of political attitudes, trust in government and institutions, political participation, and evaluations of democracy and governance."},{"title":"Czech Republic – European Social Survey 2004 (ESS Round 2)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12254","justification":"Covers 2004 in Czech Republic; repeated cross‑section with items on political interest, participation, electoral behaviour, party attachment, and confidence in political systems and organisations."},{"title":"Czech Republic – European Social Survey 2006 (ESS Round 3)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12255","justification":"2006 round includes Czech sample with detailed data on political attitudes, satisfaction with government, institutional trust, ideological self‑placement, and various forms of political engagement."},{"title":"Czech Republic – European Social Survey 2008 (ESS Round 4)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12256","justification":"For 2008, provides Czech data on political efficacy, trust in political institutions, party choice, and attitudes toward government and democracy, fitting political behaviour and attitudes in the 2000s."},{"title":"Czech Republic – European Social Survey 2010 (ESS Round 5)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12257","justification":"Fielded around 2010; still within the late 2000s/turn of decade period and includes Czech political behaviour, participation, electoral preferences, and views on government and political organisations."},{"title":"Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) – Module 1: Czech Republic","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7804/cses.module1.2003-08-04","justification":"Czech election component within CSES Module 1; focuses on voting behaviour, party choice, evaluations of parties and government, and perceptions of the political system in the early 2000s."},{"title":"Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) – Module 2: Czech Republic","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7804/cses.module2.2007-06-27","justification":"Czech post‑election data for CSES Module 2 in mid‑2000s; includes electoral participation, candidate and party evaluations, and attitudes toward political institutions and governance."},{"title":"ISSR Prague – Czech Pre‑ and Post‑Election Survey 2002","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA3811","justification":"Survey around the 2002 Czech parliamentary elections, covering vote choice, turnout, campaign exposure, and attitudes toward parties, government performance, and political system institutions during the 2000s."}]}
